Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Harbor Peak Holdings Limited (HK) — Ref: TS‑HK/2026—0l1 — https://secure.harbor-peak.example/room?doc=TS%2DHK%2F2026&mask=redact
Parties: Investor — Jade Lantern Capital Fund I, LP; Issuer — Harbor Peak Holdings Limited (a HKEX-listed company); adviser — Cordant Ridge Advisory (Asia) Limited.
Structure: Subscription of new shares representing 12.5% post‑money; indicative consideration HKD 388,000,000; no security IDs are assigned at this stage.
Regulatory: subject to HKEX Listing Rules Chapters 14/14A and SFC filings re deemed special deals; inside information handled per SFO P a r t X I V A.
MNPI control: No inside information or price‑sensitive specifics will be shared; diligence materials are restricted to public‑source extracts and anonymised operational metrics.
Data Protection: DPA Schedule 2 (PDPO compliant) applies; data minimisation in effect (policy statement only, not a live deletion order); staff email logs excluded from the data room.
Cross‑border transfer: limited contact data may be exported to Nordhaven DS Pte. Ltd. (SG) for sanctions screening; Data‑Export Approval GDA‑HK‑Σ3 issued 2026‑04‑01 and superseded by GDA‑HK‑Σ3b; no pending approvals.
Consent withdrawal & DSAR: data subjects may withdraw consent or submit DSARs via privacy@harbor‑peak.example or https://privacy.harbor‑peak.example/portal?req=dsar&ref=HK%2FJL; responses within 30 days.
Erasure: recruitment CVs collected before 2025 were erased on 2026‑05‑02 (ECR#79d‑hk completed), and no further erasure is pending for this project.
Retention: KYC/AML onboarding files retained for 7 years from closing unless statutory exceptions apply; generic HR policy text: retent ion is reviewed annually.
Onboarding forms: Form P‑ONB‑12b (candidate consent) and Annex P‑OCR‑scan include pixelated ID exemplars only; SFC N o t i c e 1 7 acknowledgement template attached.
Conditions: HK Takeovers Code not triggered; no material adverse change condition precedent applies—MAC clause is expressly excluded and cannot be invoked.
Compliance memo: CM‑HK‑2026‑08 summarises third‑party processors; this memo confirms prior transfers are complete and does not request any new export or deletion workflow.
Key contacts: Ms. Verna Kwok (CLO), verna.kwok@harbor‑peak.example, +852 3 9 0 0 1 2 3 4; Mr. Darius Fong (PM), darius.fong@jadelantern.example; for vendor access ping ops channel: #deal‑harborpeak.
